title: VANZAVANZU Loofah Sponge Set Shower Puff, 17" Anti-Slip Plastic Long Handle Loofah Body Scrubber with Exfoliating Shower Sponge, PE Soft Mesh Bath Sponge Luffa-Black with White Edge

features: 🛀【Sturdy & Non-Slip Handle】The handle of our loofah back scrubber is made of high-quality plastic material, which is less likely to break. It includes an anti-slip silicone area for better grip and control. The loofah sponge is securely tied for stability.

🛀【Maintain Cleanliness】Unlike wooden-handled bath brush, our plastic handle shower puff can resistant to dirty water erosion. It comes with a lanyard and hook for easy hanging and space-saving. Rinse, spin dry, and hang it in a well-ventilated area for a clean and hygienic experience.We recommend washing/soaking the loofah sponge with body wash before the first use.

🛀【Ergonomic 17-in Long Handle】Designed with a slightly curved 17-inch long handle, our shower sponge provides a comfortable grip and enables easy cleaning of hard-to-reach areas without painfully bending. Ideal for pregnant women, the elderly, and those with limited mobility.

🛀【Create Rich Foam】Our soft, dense and flexible mesh exfoliating sponge can create a rich foam even with a small amount of shower gel. It can effectively remove dirt, excess oil and residue without irritation. Achieve a gentle cleanse and promote clearer and smoother skin.

🛀【Perfect Pairing】Our shower sponge set includes a loofah with handle and an extra 80g loofah sponge, ensuring a healthy and comfortable bathing experience. Choose from multiple colors to match your bathroom decor and create a better bathing atmosphere. Perfect as a gift for family and friends.
